message:
feat: enforce AdapterTimeout.StreamRead via per-event read timeout

ParseSSE now accepts a WithStreamReadTimeout option that fires if no
SSE data arrives within the deadline. The timer resets on every line
read. All four SSE-based adapters wire req.AdapterTimeout.StreamRead
through a StreamReadSSEOptions helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -534,7 +534,7 @@ func (a *Adapter) Stream(ctx context.Context, req llm.Request) (llm.Stream, erro
 
 			s.Send(llm.StreamEvent{Type: llm.StreamEventProviderEvent, Raw: raw})
 			return nil
-		})
+		}, llm.StreamReadSSEOptions(req.AdapterTimeout)...)
 
 		if !finished {
 			if err := sctx.Err(); err != nil {
